name: io.github.omniologynow-rgb/scout-intel-mcp
title: Scout Intel MCP — The Google for AI Agents
description: The Google for AI agents — structured business intelligence, competitive analysis, market research, and trend tracking. 6 tools, 5+ data sources, confidence-scored JSON. Give Claude the power to research any company, market, or competitor in seconds. Free tier, no API key needed. Install: pip install scout-intel-mcp
